name: Orange Upside-Down Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in orange juice. Add sugar; stir over low heat until dissolved.
2. Chill mixture until slightly thickened but not set.
3. Arrange orange sections on bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
4. Pour gelatin mixture over oranges; chill until thickened again but not set.
5. In a separate bowl, soften another envelope gelatin in juice and stir over low heat until dissolved.
6. Combine cream cheese, sugar, and grated orange peel. Mix at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
7. Gradually add the second gelatin mixture, mixing until well combined.
8. Chill mixture until slightly thickened; fold in whipped cream.
9. Pour over oranges, chill.
10. Prepare topping by combining vanilla wafers crumbs, cinnamon, and melted margarine. Press onto top of cake.
11. Chill again. Loosen from rim of pan, invert onto serving plate, and remove the rim of the pan.
